title: "Found error in internal cell" when comparing signed against negated square root
body:
MCVE

```verilog
module top(
	input signed [7:0] x,
	output y,
);

assign y = x > -$sqrt(9);

endmodule
```

Running Yosys on this gives
```
ERROR: Found error in internal cell \top.$gt$cmproot.v:6$1 ($gt) at kernel/rtlil.cc:734:
  attribute \src "cmproot.v:6"
  cell $gt $gt$cmproot.v:6$1
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
    parameter \B_WIDTH 32
    parameter \A_WIDTH 8
    parameter \B_SIGNED 0
    parameter \A_SIGNED 1
    connect \Y $gt$cmproot.v:6$1_Y
    connect \B 32'11111111111111111111111111111101
    connect \A \x
  end
```
code_blocks:
ERROR: Found error in internal cell \top.$gt$cmproot.v:6$1 ($gt) at kernel/rtlil.cc:734:
  attribute \src "cmproot.v:6"
  cell $gt $gt$cmproot.v:6$1
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
    parameter \B_WIDTH 32
    parameter \A_WIDTH 8
    parameter \B_SIGNED 0
    parameter \A_SIGNED 1
    connect \Y $gt$cmproot.v:6$1_Y
    connect \B 32'11111111111111111111111111111101
    connect \A \x
  end
